_comment: Tier-2 for fourc beam#: beam material names use CamelCase WITHOUT inner underscores: MAT_BeamReissnerElastHyper (NOT MAT_Beam_Reissner_ElastHyper). 4C 2026.3 MATERIALS section schema lists 7 real beam materials including _ByModes variants and TorsionFree (for BEAM3EB). Catalog previously had 3 underscore-separated names — none exist. Also: BEAM3R supports LINE2/LINE3/LINE4/LINE5 (catalog missed LINE5), BEAM3K supports LINE2/LINE3/LINE4 (catalog missed LINE4). Verified 2026-06-01.
